results.evidence: github-provider.ts:98-110 uses actual response status; test github-provider.test.ts:213 confirms 401 yields 'Authentication Failed', not '404 Not Found'
Same status-priority logic; tests at github-provider.test.ts:224 (both 403) and :235 (403+404 mixed) confirm 'Permission Denied'
Priority logic: both 404 → useUserStatus=false → orgResponse(404); test at github-provider.test.ts:246 confirms preserved 404 behavior
github-validator.ts:117-123 delegates to GitHubProvider; tests at github-validator.test.ts:245 (401) and :260 (403) confirm consistent output
